task: docs: bump the version string in README.md to 1.0.3.
diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 1a2b3c4..5d6e7f8 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 # App
-Version 1.0.2
+Version 1.0.3
rationale: Oracle liveness (lovesegfault): claude -p hangs past the 45s pass timeout. _oracle_review must return infra_error=True so the caller tags the commit 'unreviewed' — surfacing this as 'approved' would be a fail-open masquerading as a review. Replayed with a stubbed subprocess layer in BOTH offline and live modes (never an API call).
